revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Floruit%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|fl|fl.}} == Usage == '''''Source:''''' {{fl.|1234}} ; {{fl.|1234–1275}} ; {{fl.|{{c.|1275}}}} ; {{fl.|1234|lk=off}} '''''Result:''''' {{fl.|1234}} ; {{fl.|1234–1275}} ; {{fl.|{{c.|1275}}}} ; {{fl.|1234|lk=off}} This template generates an abbreviation for [[:en:Floruit|Floruit]] ("fl."); by default, it has a mouse-over [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]] explaining its meaning. === Parameters === ==== First ==== This template supports an optional (first, unnamed) parameter representing a year (or range of years). For example, {{tlx|fl.|1956}} renders to give {{fl.|1956}}. This differs from {{fl.}} 1956 in that {{fl.|1956}} puts a [[:en:Non-breaking space|Non-breaking space]] in between the "fl." and the number, which prevents web browsers from inserting a line break there. ==== Sortable ==== :''This section is inserted from {{tlx|circa/doc}}, so the examples are with that template.'' {{Circa/doc/sortable}} ==== Link ==== If the {{para|lk}} (as in "link") parameter is set to {{para|lk|off}}, then the abbreviation will be rendered as plain {{fl.|lk=off}} ; otherwise, the mark of a tooltip is displayed, {{fl.}}. :The template previously was wikilinking instead of having a tooltip, so was used to avoid [[WP:Overlinking|overlinking]] when used repeatedly in an article. == See also == * [[:en:Floruit|Floruit]] * {{tl|Circa}} * {{tl|Born in}} * {{tl|Died in}} * {{tl|Reign}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Time and date abbreviation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|fl|fl.}} == Usage == '''''Source:''''' {{fl.|1234}} ; {{fl.|1234–1275}} ; {{fl.|{{c.|1275}}}} ; {{fl.|1234|lk=off}} '''''Result:''''' {{fl.|1234}} ; {{fl.|1234–1275}} ; {{fl.|{{c.|1275}}}} ; {{fl.|1234|lk=off}} This template generates an abbreviation for [[:en:Floruit|Floruit]] ("fl."); by default, it has a mouse-over [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]] explaining its meaning. === Parameters === ==== First ==== This template supports an optional (first, unnamed) parameter representing a year (or range of years). For example, {{tlx|fl.|1956}} renders to give {{fl.|1956}}. This differs from {{fl.}} 1956 in that {{fl.|1956}} puts a [[:en:Non-breaking space|Non-breaking space]] in between the "fl." and the number, which prevents web browsers from inserting a line break there. ==== Sortable ==== :''This section is inserted from {{tlx|circa/doc}}, so the examples are with that template.'' {{Circa/doc/sortable}} ==== Link ==== If the {{para|lk}} (as in "link") parameter is set to {{para|lk|off}}, then the abbreviation will be rendered as plain {{fl.|lk=off}} ; otherwise, the mark of a tooltip is displayed, {{fl.}}. :The template previously was wikilinking instead of having a tooltip, so was used to avoid [[WP:Overlinking|overlinking]] when used repeatedly in an article. == See also == * [[:en:Floruit|Floruit]] * {{tl|Circa}} * {{tl|Born in}} * {{tl|Died in}} * {{tl|Reign}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Time and date abbreviation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
